steps.t: Ashâmi is genuinely pleased to see you and told you to go and speak with Raphûz. She expects that he will be even more pleased. You can find him at th…
Raphûz and Ashâmi asked you to attend their meeting with Numûru, the right hand of Mizâdi Shâra-ingari. You should meet them at Numûru's post in Urmâk…
Ashâmi and Raphûz both asked if you would speak with Numûru about their character. The soldier professed concern about their resolve. You can find Num…
Numûru supplied you with two maps and asked you to give them to Ashâmi and Raphûz. Deliver the maps to Ashâmi and Raphûz at Numûru's post in Urmâkh.
Ashâmi and Raphûz were provided orders from Numûru to prove their courage against their fears. They both reacted differently and asked you to meet the…
